summary.en: T5-E1 Wi-Fi & Bluetooth chip module. Two packages: T5-E1 (onboard antenna) and T5-E1-IPEX (IPEX connector). Start from scratch with default platform overlay.
summary.zh-CN: T5-E1 Wi-Fi 和蓝牙芯片模组。两种封装：T5-E1（板载天线）和 T5-E1-IPEX（IPEX 接口）。使用默认平台配置从零开始开发。

summary.en:
Tuya T5AI-Board is a voice and screen multi-interaction development board based on the T5-E1-IPEX module, which is an embedded Wi-Fi and Bluetooth combo module developed by Tuya. The board is equipped with 2 microphones and 1 speaker, supporting voice recognition and playback to enable voice interaction functionality.

Through the I/O connectors on the board, you can use an LCD display stack module to implement touchscreen and camera capture capabilities. You can also design your own LCD screen, supporting multiple interfaces including I2C, SPI, 8080, and RGB.
summary.zh-CN:
涂鸦 T5AI-Board 是一款基于 T5-E1-IPEX 的语音和屏幕多交互开发板，T5-E1-IPEX 是涂鸦智能开发的嵌入式 Wi-Fi 和蓝牙组合模块。该开发板配备 2 个麦克风和 1 个扬声器，支持语音识别和播放，提供语音交互功能。

通过开发板上的 I/O 连接器，您可以使用 LCD 显示堆叠模块来实现触摸屏和摄像头捕获功能。您还可以设计自己的 LCD 屏幕，支持多种接口，包括 I2C、SPI、8080 和 RGB 接口

summary.en:
Tuya T5AI-Core Development Kit is a highly integrated voice core development board based on the T5-E1 module. The T5-E1 module, independently developed by Tuya Smart, incorporates embedded Wi-Fi and Bluetooth capabilities, making it suitable for a variety of smart hardware scenarios. This board features an onboard microphone and speaker, supporting local voice recognition and audio playback to meet the requirements of voice interaction applications.

The board is equipped with a 44-pin header, making it easy for you to quickly develop and prototype AIoT projects. An onboard lithium battery power management circuit supports low-power design, suitable for developing mobile and portable smart devices.

This board provides extensive hardware interfaces and comprehensive voice functionality, so it stands out as an ideal choice for you to develop AIoT voice interaction applications.
summary.zh-CN:
涂鸦 T5AI-Core 开发套件是一款基于 T5-E1 模组的高集成度语音核心开发板。T5-E1 模组由涂鸦智能自主研发，集成了嵌入式 Wi-Fi 与蓝牙功能，适用于多种智能硬件场景。T5AI-Core 开发板板载 1 个麦克风和 1 个扬声器，支持本地语音识别与音频播放，满足语音交互应用需求。

开发板配备 44 Pin 排针，便于开发者进行快速的 AIoT 项目开发与原型验证。板载锂电池电源管理电路，支持低功耗设计，适合移动和便携式智能设备的开发。

本开发板提供了丰富的硬件接口和完善的语音功能，是 AIoT 语音交互应用开发的理想选择。

summary.en: Pixel Art with 32x32 high pixel density LED panel. WIFI/BTE connected with Tuya T5-E1 chipset. On board with WS2812B pixel LEDs, BMI270 6-axis IMU, buzzer, and multi-button layout. Audio, mic and speakers. Make suited for AI + Pixel applications.
summary.zh-CN: 搭载 32×32 高密度像素 LED 屏，采用涂鸦 T5-E1 芯片实现蓝牙、Wi-Fi 双联网。板载 WS2812B 像素灯珠、BMI270 六轴姿态传感器、蜂鸣器与多功能按键，配备完整收音及扬声组件，专为人工智能与像素创意应用量身打造。

summary.en:
Tuya-T5-Pocket is a portable handheld device built on the open-source TuyaOpen framework. It supports deep integration with multimodal AI Agent and large language models, as well as audio-video multimodal large models.
Powered by Tuya T5 Wi-Fi & Bluetooth chip module, the project features fully open-source hardware design and software code. It comes with abundant onboard sensors and powerful external expansion compatibility.
This compact T5 AI board integrates mono display screen, camera, AXP2101 power management unit, BMI270 IMU, joystick and cellular module.
summary.zh-CN: Tuya-T5-Pocket 是一款基于 TuyaOpen 开源框架打造的便携掌机。可深度接入多模态 AI-Agent LLM 大模型和音视频多模态大模型。本项目搭配涂鸦 T5 WiFi/蓝牙芯片模组，从硬件设计到软件代码完全开源，内置丰富的传感器并具备强大的外置扩展能力。.便携式 T5AI 板，集成显示屏、摄像头、AXP2101 电源管理、BMI270 IMU、摇杆与蜂窝模块。

name.zh-CN: 涂鸦 T5AI 墨水屏 NFC 板

summary.en: T5AI board with UC8276 E-Ink display, NFC, touch panel, 6-button layout, battery management, and SD card.
summary.zh-CN: 搭载 UC8276 电子墨水屏、NFC、触摸屏、6 按键、电池管理与 SD 卡的 T5AI 板。

summary.en: The T5-E1-Mini is a dedicated controller board for dual-mode intelligent robots, built on the open-source Otto DIY ecosystem and tailored for makers, students, and robotics enthusiasts. Equipped with the Tuya T5-E1 chip, it supports dual Wi-Fi and Bluetooth connectivity and features a lively display for expressive facial interaction. It delivers 6-channel servo control and supports one-click switching between walking mode and wheeled racing mode for flexible and versatile operation. Leveraging its mature hardware design and open-source ecosystem, it enables a wide range of creative applications, including desktop intelligent companionship, AI interaction, and real-time voice dialogue.
summary.zh-CN: T5-E1-Mini 是一款基于 Otto DIY 开源生态打造的双模式智能机器人专用板卡，专为创客、在校学生及机器人爱好者量身定制。设备搭载涂鸦 T5-E1 芯片，支持 Wi-Fi、蓝牙双模组连接，配备灵动可爱的显示屏表情交互设计。支持6路舵机控制。设备支持步行模式、轮式竞速模式一键自由切换，功能形态灵活多变。依托成熟的硬件配置与开源生态，可轻松实现桌面智能陪伴、AI 智能交互、实时语音对话等多元创意场景。

name.zh-CN: 微雪 T5AI 1.75 寸触摸 AMOLED

summary.en: Waveshare 1.75" 466×466 AMOLED board with T5-E1 module, capacitive touch, QMI8658 IMU, RTC, audio AEC, battery management, and SD card.
summary.zh-CN: 微雪 1.75 寸 466×466 AMOLED 开发板，基于 T5-E1 模组，搭载电容触控、QMI8658 IMU、RTC、音频 AEC、电池管理与 SD 卡。

summary.en: Tuya T5AI engineering validation board with audio AEC and display.
summary.zh-CN: 涂鸦 T5AI 工程验证板，集成音频回声消除与显示屏。

summary.en: LCKFB GD32VW553 development board based on the GigaDevice GD32VW553 (RISC-V @160MHz with integrated Wi-Fi 6 and Bluetooth LE 5.2). Breaks out rich GPIO and peripheral interfaces (UART/I2C/SPI/QSPI/ADC/PWM) for wireless IoT development.
summary.zh-CN: 立创·GD32VW553 开发板,基于兆易创新 GD32VW553(RISC-V,主频 160MHz,集成 Wi-Fi 6 与蓝牙 BLE 5.2)。引出丰富的 GPIO 及外设接口(UART/I2C/SPI/QSPI/ADC/PWM),适合无线物联网应用开发。

summary.en: GigaDevice GD32VW553-TY1 2.4GHz Wi-Fi 6 (802.11b/g/n/ax) + BLE module on the GD32VW553 (RISC-V @160MHz, 4MB flash, onboard PCB antenna, 15 GPIO pins). Default UART2 on PA6/PA7 for download & log, UART1 on PB15/PA8 for AT commands; PC8=BOOT0, PB1=BOOT1. Maps to SDK board GD32_MC_FOC_VWS_VW553.
summary.zh-CN: 兆易创新 GD32VW553-TY1 2.4GHz Wi-Fi 6 (802.11b/g/n/ax) + BLE 模组，基于 GD32VW553（RISC-V 主频 160MHz，4MB Flash，板载 PCB 天线，引出 15 个 GPIO）。默认 PA6/PA7 = UART2（下载/日志），PB15/PA8 = UART1（AT 指令）；PC8=BOOT0，PB1=BOOT1。对应 SDK board GD32_MC_FOC_VWS_VW553。

summary.en: T5AI Otto robot board based on the Tuya T5 (T5AI). Onboard audio codec with AEC plus an optional SPI LCD expansion module (ST7789 / ST7735S / GC9D01) for the Otto robot reference design.
summary.zh-CN: 基于涂鸦 T5（T5AI）的 Otto 机器人开发板。板载带 AEC 的音频编解码器，并支持可选 SPI LCD 扩展模块（ST7789 / ST7735S / GC9D01），用于 Otto 机器人参考设计。

summary.en: Tuya T5AI robot dog board based on the Tuya T5 (T5AI). Onboard audio codec, user button, indicator LED and a built-in 172x320 SPI LCD for the robot dog reference design.
summary.zh-CN: 基于涂鸦 T5（T5AI）的机器狗开发板。板载音频编解码器、用户按键、指示灯，以及内置 172x320 SPI LCD，用于机器狗参考设计。

summary.en: Generic ESP32 development board target — dual-core Xtensa LX6 with Wi-Fi and Bluetooth/BLE. Use this as the starting point for any custom ESP32 hardware.
summary.zh-CN: 通用 ESP32 开发板目标 — 双核 Xtensa LX6，支持 Wi-Fi 与蓝牙/BLE。可作为任意自定义 ESP32 硬件的起点。

summary.en: Generic ESP32-C3 development board target — single-core RISC-V with Wi-Fi and BLE 5.0. A cost-effective starting point for connected devices.
summary.zh-CN: 通用 ESP32-C3 开发板目标 — 单核 RISC-V，支持 Wi-Fi 与蓝牙 BLE 5.0。面向联网设备的高性价比起点。

summary.en: Generic ESP32-C6 development board target — RISC-V with Wi-Fi 6, BLE 5.3, and 802.15.4 (Zigbee/Thread). For multi-protocol smart-home devices.
summary.zh-CN: 通用 ESP32-C6 开发板目标 — RISC-V，支持 Wi-Fi 6、蓝牙 BLE 5.3 及 802.15.4（Zigbee/Thread）。面向多协议智能家居设备。

summary.en: Generic ESP32-S3 development board target — dual-core Xtensa LX7 with Wi-Fi, BLE 5.0, USB-OTG, PSRAM, and AI vector instructions. For audio and display AIoT.
summary.zh-CN: 通用 ESP32-S3 开发板目标 — 双核 Xtensa LX7，支持 Wi-Fi、蓝牙 BLE 5.0、USB-OTG、PSRAM 及 AI 向量指令。面向音频与显示类 AIoT。

name.zh-CN: 乐鑫 ESP32-P4 通用开发板

summary.en: Generic ESP32-P4 development board target — high-performance dual-core RISC-V with MIPI-CSI/DSI and rich peripherals for HMI and edge-AI. Wi-Fi 6 / BLE via a companion ESP32-C6.
summary.zh-CN: 通用 ESP32-P4 开发板目标 — 高性能双核 RISC-V，集成 MIPI-CSI/DSI 与丰富外设，面向人机交互与端侧 AI。Wi-Fi 6 / BLE 由配套 ESP32-C6 提供。

name.en: 正点原子 DNESP32S3 开发板
name.zh-CN: 正点原子 DNESP32S3 开发板

summary.en: ALIENTEK DNESP32S3 development board based on ESP32-S3 — onboard ES8388 audio codec, ST7789 SPI LCD, and an XL9555 I/O expander, with 16MB flash and PSRAM.
summary.zh-CN: 正点原子 DNESP32S3 开发板，基于 ESP32-S3。板载 ES8388 音频编解码器、ST7789 SPI LCD 与 XL9555 I/O 扩展芯片，配 16MB Flash 与 PSRAM。

summary.en: ALIENTEK DNESP32S3-BOX based on ESP32-S3 — boxed AI voice-interaction kit with ES8311 codec, ST7789 8080-interface LCD, and XL9555 I/O expander.
summary.zh-CN: 正点原子 DNESP32S3-BOX，基于 ESP32-S3。盒式 AI 语音交互套件，板载 ES8311 编解码器、ST7789 8080 接口 LCD 与 XL9555 I/O 扩展芯片。

summary.en: ALIENTEK DNESP32S3-BOX2 (Wi-Fi) based on ESP32-S3 — ES8389 audio codec, ST7789 8080-interface LCD with backlight, and a multi-function XL9555 I/O expander.
summary.zh-CN: 正点原子 DNESP32S3-BOX2 (Wi-Fi)，基于 ESP32-S3。板载 ES8389 音频编解码器、带背光的 ST7789 8080 接口 LCD，以及多功能 XL9555 I/O 扩展芯片。

name.zh-CN: 微雪 ESP32-S3 Touch AMOLED 1.8 寸

summary.en: Waveshare ESP32-S3 Touch AMOLED 1.8" board — 368x448 SH8601 QSPI AMOLED with FT5x06 capacitive touch, ES8311 audio codec, AXP2101 PMIC, and a TCA9554 I/O expander.
summary.zh-CN: 微雪 ESP32-S3 Touch AMOLED 1.8 寸开发板 — 368x448 SH8601 QSPI AMOLED 屏，配 FT5x06 电容触摸、ES8311 音频编解码器、AXP2101 电源管理与 TCA9554 I/O 扩展芯片。

name.en: 微雪 ESP32-C6 开发套件 N16
name.zh-CN: 微雪 ESP32-C6 开发套件 N16

summary.en: Waveshare ESP32-C6 Dev Kit (N16, 16MB flash) — minimal board with a user button and an addressable RGB LED. Wi-Fi 6, BLE 5.3, and 802.15.4.
summary.zh-CN: 微雪 ESP32-C6 开发套件（N16，16MB Flash）— 精简板型，板载用户按键与可寻址 RGB LED。支持 Wi-Fi 6、BLE 5.3 及 802.15.4。

name.zh-CN: 微雪 ESP32-P4-C6 Touch LCD 4.3 寸

summary.en: Waveshare ESP32-P4-C6 Touch LCD 4.3" board — 480x800 MIPI-DSI display with GT911 capacitive touch, ES8311 audio codec, and onboard ESP32-C6 for Wi-Fi 6 / BLE.
summary.zh-CN: 微雪 ESP32-P4-C6 Touch LCD 4.3 寸开发板 — 480x800 MIPI-DSI 显示屏，配 GT911 电容触摸、ES8311 音频编解码器，板载 ESP32-C6 提供 Wi-Fi 6 / BLE。

name.en: 虾哥 ESP32-S3 立方体 0.96 寸 OLED (Wi-Fi)
name.zh-CN: 虾哥 ESP32-S3 立方体 0.96 寸 OLED (Wi-Fi)

summary.en: Xingzhi ESP32-S3 Cube with a 0.96" SSD1306 OLED (128x64, I2C) and codec-less I2S audio. A compact Wi-Fi AI voice-assistant reference.
summary.zh-CN: 虾哥 ESP32-S3 立方体开发板，搭载 0.96 寸 SSD1306 OLED（128x64，I2C）与无编解码器 I2S 音频。小型 Wi-Fi AI 语音助手参考设计。

summary.en: Compact breadboard ESP32-S3 reference with a 0.96" SSD1306 OLED (128x32, I2C) and codec-less I2S audio — a minimal DIY Wi-Fi build.
summary.zh-CN: 紧凑型面包板 ESP32-S3 参考设计，搭载 0.96 寸 SSD1306 OLED（128x32，I2C）与无编解码器 I2S 音频，适合极简 DIY Wi-Fi 方案。

summary.en: Run TuyaOpen apps natively on Ubuntu or other desktop Linux (x86_64 or arm64). Ideal for LVGL SDL simulator-style UI and cloud-connected demos on a PC.
summary.zh-CN: 在 Ubuntu 或其他桌面 Linux（x86_64 / arm64）上原生运行 TuyaOpen 应用，适合 SDL 桌面 UI 与云端连接类 demo。

summary.en: Raspberry Pi 4B / 5 running TuyaOpen with ALSA audio, optional SDL2 display, keyboard trigger, and V4L2 USB camera support.
summary.zh-CN: 树莓派 4B / 5 运行 TuyaOpen，支持 ALSA 音频、可选 SDL2 显示、键盘触发与 V4L2 USB 摄像头。

summary.en: TaishanPi 3 SBC (Rockchip RK3576) with ALSA audio, SDL2 display, keyboard input, and optional V4L2 camera — for edge AI chatbot demos.
summary.zh-CN: 泰山派 3（瑞芯微 RK3576）支持 ALSA 音频、SDL2 显示、键盘输入与可选 V4L2 摄像头，适用于端侧 AI 聊天 demo。

summary.en: 100ask DshanPi-A1 Linux board with ALSA audio (AEC) and keyboard trigger for TuyaOpen voice applications.
summary.zh-CN: 百问网 DshanPi-A1 Linux 开发板，支持 ALSA 音频（AEC）与键盘触发，适用于 TuyaOpen 语音应用。
